code: import React,{useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminDashboard=()=>{const[personId,setPersonId]=useState('');const[person,setPerson]=useState(null);const[metrics,setMetrics]=useState(null);const fetchPerson=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get("/api/persons/".concat(personId));setPerson(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Failed to fetch person');}};const deletePerson=async()=>{try{await axios.delete("/api/persons/".concat(personId));setPerson(null);}catch(error){console.error('Failed to delete person');}};const fetchMetrics=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get('/api/metrics');setMetrics(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Failed to fetch metrics');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Admin Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Person ID",value:personId,onChange:e=>setPersonId(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:fetchPerson,children:"Get Person"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:deletePerson,children:"Delete Person"})]}),person&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Person Details"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["ID: ",person.person_id]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Name: ",person.name]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Embeddings: ",person.embeddings.length]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:fetchMetrics,children:"Get Metrics"}),metrics&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Metrics"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Recognitions: ",metrics.recognition_count]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Enrolls: ",metrics.enroll_count]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Avg Latency: ",metrics.avg_latency_ms," ms"]})]})]});};export default AdminDashboard;
